add_namespace = modern

country_event = {
    id = modern.1
    title = modern.1.t
    immediate = {
        news_event = modern.2
    }
    option = {
        name = modern.1.a
        hidden_effect = {
            operative_leader_event = {
                id = modern.3
                hours = 6
                random_hours = 2
            }
        }
    }
}

news_event = {
    id = modern.2
    title = modern.2.t
    is_triggered_only = yes
    immediate = { }
    option = {
        name = modern.2.a
    }
}

operative_leader_event = {
    id = modern.3
    title = modern.3.t
    immediate = {
        mio:test_vendor = {
            country_event = {
                id = modern.4
                days = 2
                random_days = 1
            }
        }
    }
    option = {
        name = modern.3.a
    }
}

country_event = {
    id = modern.4
    title = modern.4.t
    immediate = { }
    option = {
        name = modern.4.a
    }
}
